title: Parallel Coordinates Studio
description: Brush and reorder a parallel-coordinates plot across your own CSV data or three built-in sample datasets, then export PNG or filtered CSV.
concept: A real data-exploration tool, not a toy chart: pick a built-in sample (Cars, Flowers, World Snapshot) or paste/upload your own CSV and it's auto-typed into numeric or categorical axes. Drag along any axis to brush a value range and filter every line at once, drag an axis label to reorder the dimensions, recolor by any column, and tune line weight/opacity live. Export the current view as a PNG or the filtered rows as CSV, and save a named custom dataset that reloads automatically next visit.
features: 3 built-in synthetic datasets (Cars, Flowers, World Snapshot) plus CSV paste/upload with auto column-type detection
Drag-to-brush multi-axis filtering that combines across axes (AND logic)
Drag-to-reorder axis labels with live re-layout
Color-by any dimension (categorical palette or numeric gradient) with auto-updating legend
Hover tooltip that finds the nearest line and shows every value for that row
PNG export of the current chart and CSV export of the currently filtered rows
Named custom-dataset saving to localStorage that reloads automatically on return visits
tech: Custom CSV parser with type inference

interaction.mouse: Drag along an axis to brush a value range; drag an axis label to reorder columns; hover a line for a tooltip
interaction.click: Double-click a brush to clear it; use the toolbar to switch datasets, import CSV, or export
interaction.touch: Same brushing and reordering gestures with larger touch hit zones; settings panel opens via the ⚙ button
interaction.keyboard: Standard tab/enter navigation on all form controls
